description_long: This electric drill features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly green and black color scheme, accented by metallic highlights. The main body is rectangular and bulky, with a cylindrical base that appears reinforced for stability. A prominent barrel extends from the front, suggesting a heavy-duty drill bit attachment, while the rear section is squared off and may house the motor or battery compartment. The surface is matte with visible wear, indicating frequent use or rugged construction. Several mechanical details, such as bolts, ridges, and possible venting, are visible, enhancing its utilitarian appearance. The overall form factor suggests it is designed for stationary or mounted operation rather than handheld use.
description: A heavy-duty, green and black electric drill with a cylindrical base and prominent front barrel, featuring rugged, industrial detailing and a matte, worn finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular main body, cylindrical base, and extended drill barrel, with visible mechanical details and surface wear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drill barrel and symmetrical base, with the drill bit attachment clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the squared rear section and the full length of the drill barrel, with additional surface details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the squared back and possible battery compartment, with the base and some mechanical features visible.
